candidate: v49c_cute_tile_n16: CuTe scorer tile N=16, 8 warps/256 threads, parallel epilogue
method: Double CuTe scorer token tile from N=8 to N=16, expanding TiledMMA layout from Shape<_4,_1,_1> to Shape<_4,_2,_1> (4 warps M x 2 warps N), giving M=64 heads, N=16 tokens, K=16 with 8 warps / 256 threads per CTA. This halves scorer CTAs (~280→~140 for medium band) with better Q data reuse per CTA. Parallel epilogue: each warp independently reduces 2 tokens (32 lanes cover 64 heads at 2 heads/lane), eliminating inter-warp merge and shared-memory barrier. launch_bounds(256,2) targets 2 CTAs/SM. Filtered selector, hist2048 fallback, short-only pass-through, and PDL unchanged.

selected_retained_run.label: v49c_cute_tile_n16_full128
selected_retained_run.reason: Single validated full-sweep run, 128/128 passed. Avg latency 6.893us is a clear -9.4% improvement over v48.
